title: Canopy Growth Q3 2025 Earnings Call Summary
text: Canopy Growth reported Q3 2025 earnings (period ending December 31, 2024) with consolidated net revenue of $75 million, down 5% year-over-year but up 8% excluding divestitures. Gross margin of 32% down from 36% year-over-year. Adjusted EBITDA loss of $3 million representing 61% improvement versus prior year. Free cash flow outflow of $28 million with 17% improvement year-over-year. Cash and short-term investments totaled $178 million as of December 31, 2024. Total principal debt was $460 million. Canada Cannabis reported $41 million revenue up 1% year-over-year with medical cannabis hitting record revenue of 16% growth. Adult-use down 10% year-over-year but up 15% quarter-over-quarter. Claybourne pre-rolls ranked number 3 in BC and Ontario within six weeks. International Markets reported $12 million revenue up 14% year-over-year with European business growing over 70% driven by Poland and Germany strength. Storz & Bickel reported $22 million revenue up 19% year-over-year with VENTY vaporizer continuing strong performance. Gross margin declined to 41% from 51% due to higher shipping costs. CEO Luc Mongeau emphasized focus on sustained profitability and positive cash generation.
